issue_statement: Engineering project readiness still lacks one canonical preview payload and stable reason codes.
expected_outcome: SCE returns one canonical preview payload from the existing engineering preview path.
impact_scope: engineering project preview, readiness rendering, project panel support
reproduction_steps: Call the current engineering preview path
Observe that readiness semantics are not yet normalized into one canonical payload
Observe that adapters still need to derive part of the state locally
forbidden_workarounds: Do not mix open/import step state into the preview payload
Do not move readiness truth into adapter-local state
